## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and resolve contract terms for a partnership between ottotheagent.com and growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement to modify contract terms: opt-in for Phase 2, add breach clause, adjust KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Billing terms to be finalized (monthly vs. upfront payment)](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [PIAA (or NDA) to be reviewed and potentially signed](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Tentative start date: Tuesday after Labor Day (pending contract finalization)](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

## Topics

### Contract Modifications

  - [Shift to opt-in model for Phase 2 instead of automatic renewal](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Add breach clause with 30-day correction period](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Include KPIs or quality metrics in the contract (e.g., "approved by client" in definition of done)](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Logo usage requires written consent from both parties](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Indemnification clause to be added](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Governing law: Delaware, venue: Washington (potential for adjustment)](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Billing Terms

  - [Current proposal: Monthly billing, paid upfront](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Michael prefers payment after work completion](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Bridget to reconsider, citing cash flow concerns for early-stage companies](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)

### PIAA vs. NDA

  - [Michael to send vendor-specific PIAA for review](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Bridget prefers standard NDA, will review PIAA to check for redundancy with existing work product language](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

### Project Timeline

  - [Proposed start date: Tuesday after Labor Day (September 5, 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [Contract finalization targeted for the following day (August 29, 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)

### Quality Assurance

  - [Discussion on including metrics for deliverable quality](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Suggestion to add "approved by client" to the definition of done](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Focus on maintaining quality throughout the contract duration](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to update contract with opt-in for Phase 2 and breach clause](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Michael to send vendor PIAA document for review](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Michael to finalize decision on billing terms](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [Bridget to refine KPI/quality metric language in the contract](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Both parties to review and finalize contract by August 29, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Tentative project start date set for September 5, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/PjujnV3KzmZaQrbwATt5czbCpFjSach3?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
